chapter_title.en: Chapter 100 – Waiting period of the Mut’a

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/242)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/242)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عِدَّةُ الْمُتْعَةِ خَمْسَةٌ وَ أَرْبَعُونَ يَوْماً وَ الِاحْتِيَاطُ خَمْسَةٌ وَ أَرْبَعُونَ لَيْلَةً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Nasr,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws having said: ‘Abu Ja’farasws said: ‘The waiting period of Mut’a is of forty five days, and the precaution is of forty five nights (i.e. one extra)’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan al-Rida’ has said that abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Waiting period for al- Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage) is forty five days and because of precaution it is forty five nights.’”
